response.justification: Candidate is an experienced senior engineer with a strong polyglot background (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, some Java/C++), but the resume shows no meaningful depth in the JVM ecosystem required for this role. Java appears only briefly (robotic arms, mobile orchestration tooling years ago) and there is no Kotlin, Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate, application server, or IDE-internals experience. The role specifically demands deep JVM expertise and genuine interest in IDE/language tooling, which is not evidenced here.
strengths: Senior-level experience across large-scale, complex systems and microservices
Demonstrated interest in developer tooling, testing frameworks, and IDE-adjacent work (LabWindows/CVI at NI, test runners, MCP tooling)
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, workshops, open-source contributions
concerns: No demonstrated Spring/Quarkus/Hibernate or enterprise Java framework experience
No Kotlin experience listed; Java exposure is limited and dated
No prior work on IDE internals, language tooling, or JVM-level engineering

key_factors.factor: No Kotlin and only peripheral Java background
Senior engineering breadth and tooling/IDE-adjacent exposure
